title: Initiative launched — outreach begins to 200+ institutions worldwide
excerpt: The Knowledge Ark Initiative begins its global outreach campaign, contacting over 200 institutions across 6 continents.

title: First institutional responses received across 4 continents
excerpt: Libraries, archives, and digital preservation organisations from Europe, Asia, South America, and Africa respond to the initiative.

title: Technology partnerships forming — ceramic, crystal, and lunar storage
excerpt: Conversations with Cerabyte, SPhotonix, and Lonestar Data Holdings establish the technological foundation for permanent knowledge preservation.
